title: Chapter 327 – Heaven Shaking (6)
content:
Beneath pure white sunlight threaded with dust.

Void treading and sword flight.

The contrast between the two figures was stark. A sight rarely witnessed in the world.

Star Radiance Great Sword Lord Murong Jung-rak stood upon the air itself, while Lotus Nezha Jeong Yeon-shin rose to meet him, riding the sword he had drawn at some unknown moment.

Dust from shattered stone drifted around them like mist. The confrontation looked like a painting.

Below, exclamations of astonishment spilled from the stunned crowd. The Radiant Demon Wing Leader caught the voices of his three companions.

"Good heavens... what I saw earlier really was sword flight! I can finally believe it now."

"You seemed envious of our young master's height, but in a manner befitting a squad leader..."

"Is that really sword flight?!"

Jokes and shock mingled together. The typical speech of Radiant Demon Wing's martial artists--finding composure even in the most urgent moments.

Woong--

Standing atop the white Northern Light Divine Sword, he silently gazed ahead.

The figure of the Murong family head, veiled behind grayish currents like a curtain, met his gaze.

"......"

The eyes of Liaoning's foremost figure flashed colorlessly.

They were extraordinarily intense.

That was the nature of his gaze. Like dozens of sword blades compressed into a single thread. Though only his silhouette was visible through the dust, he seemed something other than human.

Jeong Yeon-shin wondered. What difference would there be between him and Zhuge Clan Leader?

'Power accumulated purely in the body...'

This was different from spell martial arts. It meant his defining traits were not exotic variations and extreme power.

He was simply strong. Without relying on all manner of spell formations and dharma treasures. A single sword contained his entire life. Regardless of what the Murong family head's life had been.

Perhaps because their martial lineages were so different, the superiority between the two family heads was not easily determined.

But the martial prowess of the Eight Clan Leaders could not all be the same. As one grows more powerful, the world one inhabits broadens accordingly.

Since even Black-ranks have varying levels of martial prowess, the realm of major faction leaders would be even more diverse.

'In any case, I need to fight on the ground.'

He could not handle this in a sword flight state. A martial artist who could freely deploy sword techniques while void treading would inevitably hold the advantage.

The sword flight had been activated to draw Murong Jung-rak's attention. The strike of a peerless swordsman should not be directed at innocent bystanders.

It was then.

"Put aside distracting thoughts."

The shadow with its waist held nobly straight moved its lips.

"You should be tempering your sword energy even now."

The absolute ruler of Liaoning spoke. It almost sounded like counsel.

He expressed no particular sentiment. Star Radiance Great Sword Lord Murong Jung-rak no longer looked down at those below and spoke only to Jeong Yeon-shin.

Despite surely knowing that his young family head had been killed by the Radiant Demon Wing Leader's subordinate.

Jeong Yeon-shin did not answer.

There was no need to exchange words with such a figure. It would be foolish to attempt negotiation with a monster who wielded a sword.

He was the enemy of Hyeon Won-chang, and Jeong Yeon-shin had witnessed the moment his son died.

In terms of martial world grudges, they were irreconcilable. This would hold true even if one side performed the Golden Powder Face Washing.

'If I die, so be it. I'm doing my duty.'

He circulated the Luminous Wheel Technique from his heart to the three meridians of his face. As the energy passed through the Tongziliao acupoint outside both eyes, blue light flashed.

The eye technique activated. The Luminous Wheel Technique flowing between his optic nerve and Baihui acupoint.

Simultaneously, his vision flashed white.

It was the scabbard of the Murong family's Flowing Star Sword. It had struck without warning.

'Let's go.'

Jeong Yeon-shin spoke to the Northern Light Divine Sword.

The blade responded immediately to its master's thoughts. Unlike his body, which had not yet achieved unity of essence, energy, and spirit.

He soared upward on his sword.

Whoosh--!

His field of vision transformed. The moment he felt pressure bearing down on his crown, his surroundings collapsed into straight lines, and then the barren mountain peaks of the wilderness unfolded before his eyes.

He had escaped the deep cave in an instant. The air flowing into his lungs through internal energy breathing became far fresher.

Kuguung--

A tremendous roar sounded far below. A fierce wind brushed against the toe of Jeong Yeon-shin's leather shoe as he stood on the Northern Light Divine Sword.

It was the aftermath of the peerless sword strike. Despite having clearly evaded it, the sword power that shook the void for dozens of zhang was immense.

"You."

Faint surprise colored the voice.

With intense vibrations, Murong Jung-rak's voice grew clearer. The figure rising from beneath the Northern Light Divine Sword. The ruler of Liaoning cutting through the void with incredibly refined void treading, as though swimming through the sky.

The confidence that he could now capture the Slaughter Sect masters at any time was evident. In determining priorities, the Lotus Nezha had been placed first.

"Must leave your head here."

His words concluded right before Jeong Yeon-shin's face.

The current Radiant Demon Wing Leader felt an almost unconscious gratitude. This was the attitude always shown by the enemy monkeys he had faced. The situation made survival far from certain, but it set his mind somewhat at ease.

They faced each other amid the bright sunlight.

He was a middle-aged man with unusually thick eyebrows. His impression was both stubborn and fierce, intertwined with transcendent energy waves.

Dressed in spotless white robes, he appeared like a deity of the sky.

In the air.

Jeong Yeon-shin silently crossed one mountain peak. The Murong family head followed like a ghost.

Thud.

The Radiant Demon Wing Leader descended onto a yellowish-brown clearing with an apparently nonchalant demeanor. Murong Jung-rak also landed with a perfectly straight posture.

Both were swordsmen. The ground, where true steps could be planted, would inevitably be more comfortable. After the dull sound of footsteps echoed, the silence between the two men deepened.

A rocky mountain in the barren wilderness.

The distance was one zhang. For a peerless master, this was extremely close.

Jeong Yeon-shin, who had met Murong Jung-rak's gaze, extended his hand to the side.

Tap.

The energy waves of the Northern Light Divine Sword that had been floating came into his grasp. At the same time, he projected the mental image of a fan woven from strands of light from the Northern Light Divine Sword toward the Murong family head.

Mystical Secret Technique. Fan Dragon Treading Lotus Technique.

Just as a dragon that had materialized in his mind was about to seize that white crane fan and fly toward the Murong family head's crown.

Thud thud thud--

The sound of hoofbeats.

An enormous presence of men and horses approached at tremendous speed. The Radiant Demon Wing Leader's perception, which had focused every fiber of energy sense on the Murong family head, was caught off guard.

Murong Jung-rak seemed similarly affected. The speed at which he turned his pupils was only slightly faster than Jeong Yeon-shin's.

A massive dust cloud rose along the ridge. It came with the resonance of hundreds of people moving as one.

"Profound Martial Alliance."

Murong Jung-rak muttered.

Jeong Yeon-shin had already guessed. These were the martial forces he had only heard about--different from those led by Goon Yu-rin. The energy waves they emitted were uniformly powerful, suggesting they were no ordinary members of the Profound Martial Alliance.

At their vanguard, a man wearing a fur coat that reached his feet was flying across the ground.

He was an enormous figure. Semi-transparent energy waves surrounded him like a city wall.

His protective technique, like that of an immortal wandering the netherworld, was impressive. While his bearing was dignified as a king's, he approached with terrifyingly cold eyes, continuously carving the space before him.

The air trembled incessantly. An invisible military aura forged of internal energy pierced the sky.

Thud thud thud thud--!

They were deploying a sword formation while riding at full gallop. The internal energy they coordinated like invisible threads intensified as they drew closer.

Every sword tip pointed at Jeong Yeon-shin as they charged forward. These were the forces directly led by the Profound Martial Alliance Leader. How powerful they might be could be guessed without firsthand experience.

***

https://discord.gg/XC9DTsTQ9Z

***

"Military King. You've made up your mind."

Murong Jung-rak's lips curved upward slightly. Was this the leisure of a peerless master?

Even when facing an equal opponent, he never lost his distinctive atmosphere. He could probably escape at any time, which might explain his composure.

He slowly turned his head toward Jeong Yeon-shin.

"They say you excel at short decisive battles. I'll take your head before they arrive."

"You seem quite relaxed."

Jeong Yeon-shin replied briefly. While once again envisioning the dragon holding the fan.

"You have no sword spirit."

Murong Jung-rak continued.

"Not even Namgung's corpse will protect you."

He was referring to the Martial Alliance meeting.

The ruler of Liaoning paid no attention to the approaching martial forces.

He and the Radiant Demon Wing Leader were acquainted. They had crossed paths several times during the Great Faction War.

At that time, Jeong Yeon-shin had strengthened Sword Star by retrieving Azure Qilin's corpse from the Zhuge family.

That act had even diminished the influence of the Murong family head, who had been allied with Zhuge Clan Leader. The Murong family had been forced to sever ties to maintain their standing in the Alliance.

Just now, Murong Jung-rak had laid bare Jeong Yeon-shin's situation.

It meant that in this place, his backing and justification would not protect him. He was right.

The gaze and silence of Sword Star, the Nine Great Sects, Forest-Treading Squad Xiahou Wei-jin and Desolate Divine Spear Yue Shou-lin, as well as the white path martial world silenced by Azure Qilin's corpse--none of these were present.

He could not even hope for the overwhelming force that had annihilated the Hwangbo family two years ago.

The Black-ranks counted among the Three Black Pillars--the Annihilation Team Squad Leader, the intact-armed Divine Blood Extreme Demon, and the Burning Abyss Team Leader with his refined spell sword techniques--along with some seventy Desolate Fortress Blue-ranks would be nearly invincible.

But such a force would be impossible to assemble again. The situation was too urgent, with everyone consumed by their own missions.

The major factions that had accumulated martial prowess under Desolate Fortress's oppression.

Times were changing. The Zhongyuan Martial Alliance meeting was just the beginning. Martial artists were breaking the sword clusters of the imperial court throughout the land.

Desolate Fortress could no longer preemptively stop the coordination of all manner of factions. This was why the Administration Office of the main fortress perpetually complained of being short-handed.

Complete isolation.

At this moment, Jeong Yeon-shin was like the current Desolate Fortress itself. That was his situation. Only the hearts of the three Radiant Demon Wing members now bursting out from underground would reach him.

A martial force of over a hundred deploying a sword formation. Two major faction leaders with transcendent presences.

This was the martial world in which the Lotus Nezha found himself.

He had become a target of attention as significant as the Desolate Divine Spear representing Desolate Fortress.

[Drop your sword.]

Six-directional spirit energy. A dry voice struck his ears like lightning.

It rang out from the vanguard of the martial artists riding up the gentle slope. The Profound Martial Alliance Leader spoke with kingly dignity as he approached and continued.

[Radiant Demon Wing Leader Jeong Yeon-shin. If you do not resist, you will be treated as a prisoner. Do not raise your sword even with Murong Jung-rak before you.]

The Profound Martial Alliance Leader's voice gradually faded.

Not because he had lowered it. Colorless energy waves were flashing from his Adam's apple.

One who had reached the extreme of unity of essence, energy, and spirit. His internal energy responded to the slightest movement. Even his blood flow and pulse were said to be composed of martial art in the state of Five Elements Returning to the Source, which he may have stepped into.

The fact that internal energy waves shimmered at his throat meant he was clearly moving the muscles and ligaments inside it.

[This is...]

The trailing words of the absolute being suddenly faded like an echo.

"Vermin."

Hwook--!

A rough voice struck down from the void, and in that instant, the sunlight unraveled in all directions like threads.

Day and night seemed to blur.

Amid countless rays of light that had been illuminating the ridge, bending into all manner of shapes, shadows flickered rapidly in every conceivable form below. Colorless fragments of true energy creating and erasing shadows everywhere.

Saaaa--

The distant sky was the source.

What had been merely a black dot grew rapidly larger. It descended with energy waves pouring down like a tidal wave.

A handsome man with thick, sharply defined features.

He appeared to be about thirty. The figure descending with his arms folded had endless concentric waves surging around him.

The air around his body distorted and straightened continuously with a deep pink hue. Amid this, the utter stillness of his long robe hem and the purple silk tassel at his sword hilt struck an eerie note.

A bearing with no refinement or dignity whatsoever.

Yet what those on the ground saw, looking up, was the descent of a monstrous divine power in human form, tearing through space itself.

The figure of the man violently flicking one sleeve was etched against the void.

It was a foot technique.

A pale blue wave of energy fell upon the heads of the charging mounted martial artists.

Translucent blue shockwaves stacked in layers within an instant. Then a heavy vibration distorted space like flames.

Harmonious Flower Annihilation Technique. Sword Sun.

Puhwak--!

A hundred pairs of men and horses were simultaneously crushed and shattered.

Amid the blood that erupted outward and immediately turned to white steam, fragments of blue flame scattered like flower petals.[TL Note- GRANDPAA IS HERE]
